title: Deep Reinforcement Learning
subtitle: From RL Foundations to PPO, SAC, and the Spinning Up Toolkit

modules.title: RL Foundations
modules.description: Agents, environments, policies, value functions, and the mathematical landscape of modern RL algorithms.

modules.title: Policy Gradient Algorithms
modules.description: VPG, TRPO, and PPO — the on-policy family of algorithms that directly optimize the policy objective.

modules.title: Off-Policy Methods & Tooling
modules.description: DDPG, TD3, and SAC for continuous control, plus the Spinning Up toolkit for running, logging, and benchmarking experiments.

modules.title: Visual Reinforcement Learning
modules.description: Train agents directly from pixels using convolutional policies, frame stacking, and ViZDoom — from a stationary-enemy basic scenario to multi-target arena combat.
